scripts.skills:check: test -f .agents/skills/nextjs-best-practices/SKILL.md && test -f .agents/skills/nextjs-code-review/SKILL.md && test -f .agents/skills/nextjs-code-review/references/app-router-patterns.md && test -f .agents/skills/nextjs-code-review/references/performance.md && test -f .agents/skills/nextjs-code-review/references/server-components.md && test -f .agents/skills/nextjs-performance/SKILL.md && test -f .agents/skills/multi-stage-dockerfile/SKILL.md && test -f .agents/skills/react-doctor/SKILL.md
scripts.verify: bun run lint && bun run test && bun run build
scripts.hooks:install: command -v git >/dev/null 2>&1 && git rev-parse --is-inside-work-tree >/dev/null 2>&1 && git config core.hooksPath .githooks || true
scripts.versign: node -e "const fs=require('fs'); const p=require('./package.json'); const [ma,mi,pa] = p.version.split('.').map(Number); p.version = ma + '.' + mi + '.' + (pa + 1); fs.writeFileSync('./package.json', JSON.stringify(p, null, 2) + '\n'); console.log('versign: bumped to', p.version);" && git add package.json
